messages.text: This ticket needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve" to approve it.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Specifier tile shows a long-resolved decision menu as if still live — mark LIVE vs RESOLVED
What it solves: WHAT / WHY. An agent tile renders a host-RECONSTRUCTED transcript, not the
raw tmux pane, because the Claude CLI runs an alternate-screen TUI that keeps
no tmux scrollback (paneTailer.ts, BL-070 — paneHistory / lastText). So a
resolved AskUserQuestion decision menu stays visible in the tile long af…
How it works: A decision menu present in the pane's current captured frame is classified LIVE
